ddls:
CREATE TABLE "songs" (
  "song_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each song */,
  "name" TEXT /* Title of the song */,
  "popularity" INTEGER /* Popularity score of the song */,
  "album_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the album the song belongs to */,
  "danceability" REAL /* Danceability score of the song */,
  "energy" REAL /* Energy score of the song */,
  "key" INTEGER /* Musical key of the song */,
  "loudness" REAL /* Loudness level of the song */,
  "speechiness" REAL /* Speechiness score of the song */,
  "acousticness" REAL /* Acousticness score of the song */,
  "time_signature" INTEGER /* Time signature of the song */,
  "valence" REAL /* Valence score of the song */,
  "tempo" REAL /* Tempo (BPM) of the song */,
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the artist performing the song */,
  "duration_ms" INTEGER /* Duration of the song in milliseconds */,
  "explicit" INTEGER /* Indicator if the song contains explicit content */,
  "track_number" INTEGER /* Track number of the song within its album */,
  "disc_number" INTEGER /* Disc number the song appears on in a multi-disc album */,
  "isrc" TEXT /* International Standard Recording Code for the song */,
  "lyrics" TEXT /* Text of the song lyrics */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("song_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_songs_album_id FOREIGN KEY ("album_id") REFERENCES albums ("album_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_songs_artist_id FOREIGN KEY ("artist_id") REFERENCES artists ("artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "albums" (
  "album_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each album */,
  "album_name" TEXT /* Name of the album */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the album */,
  "label" TEXT /* Record label that released the album */,
  "total_tracks" INTEGER /* Total number of tracks in the album */,
  "album_type" TEXT /* Type of album (e.g., album, single, compilation) */,
  "cover_image_url" TEXT /* URL to the album cover image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("album_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "artists" (
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each artist */,
  "artist_name" TEXT /* Name of the artist */,
  "genre" TEXT /* Genre of the artist */,
  "debut_year" INTEGER /* Year the artist debuted */,
  "artist_image_url" TEXT /* URL to the artist's image */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Brief biography of the artist */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the artist */,
  "website_url" TEXT /* Official website of the artist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "playlists" (
  "playlist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each playlist */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who created the playlist */,
  "playlist_name" TEXT /* Name of the playlist */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the playlist was created */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the playlist */,
  "public" INTEGER /* Indicator if the playlist is public or private */,
  "followers_count" INTEGER /* Number of users following the playlist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("playlist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "playlist_songs" (
  "playlist_song_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the playlist-song association */,
  "playlist_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the playlist */,
  "song_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the song */,
  "added_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the song was added to the playlist */,
  "added_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who added the song to the playlist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("playlist_song_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_playlist_songs_song_id FOREIGN KEY ("song_id") REFERENCES songs ("song_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_playlist_songs_playlist_id FOREIGN KEY ("playlist_id") REFERENCES playlists ("playlist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "subscription_type" TEXT /* Type of subscription (e.g., Free, Premium) */,
  "signup_date" TEXT /* Sign-up date of the user */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the user */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Birth date of the user */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_playlists" (
  "user_playlist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the user-playlist association */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "playlist_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the playlist */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the context of the playlist (e.g., owner, collaborator) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_playlist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_playlists_playlist_id FOREIGN KEY ("playlist_id") REFERENCES playlists ("playlist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_playlists_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "song_genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre association */,
  "song_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the song */,
  "genre_name" TEXT /* Name of the genre */,
  "sub_genre" TEXT /* Sub-genre of the song for more specific categorization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_song_genres_song_id FOREIGN KEY ("song_id") REFERENCES songs ("song_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the access event */,
  "song_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the song being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user accessing the song */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., play, skip) */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used for access (e.g., mobile, desktop) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographical location of the user at the time of access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_song_id FOREIGN KEY ("song_id") REFERENCES songs ("song_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
